title: Dangote Industries Set to Invest Big in Angola’s Oil and Cement Sectors - FinancialEDGE
description: President of Angola, João Lourenço and President/CE, Dangote Industries Limited, Aliko Dangote, during an investment meeting of building cement factories, oil block acquisition in Luanda, Angola.
html: President of Angola, João Lourenço and President/CE, Dangote Industries Limited, Aliko Dangote, during an investment meeting of building cement factories, oil block acquisition in Luanda, Angola.
